title: Gopuram
summary: Gateway tower marking transition from ordinary space into sacred space.
notes: Often decorated with deities and mythic scenes

title: Mandapa
summary: Pillared hall used for rituals, gathering, music, and temple movement.

title: Garbhagriha
summary: Inner sanctum where the principal deity is enshrined.
notes: Access is controlled by temple tradition

title: Vimana
summary: Tower above sanctum, symbolising the divine axis.
